moments.title: Golf's The Open returns
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's major tournaments, begins next week at Royal Portrush in Northern Ireland.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Royal Portrush calling! Golf's biggest major, The Open Championship, tees off next week. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for The Open at Royal Portrush. Get ready for four days of incredible golf action.

moments.title: Tour de France in full swing
moments.blurb: The iconic Tour de France, cycling's most prestigious race, is well underway, captivating fans across Europe.

angles.name: Yellow Jersey
angles.copy: Allez, allez! The Tour de France peloton is battling it out across France. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey this year?

angles.name: Drama
angles.copy: Epic climbs and thrilling sprints – the Tour de France is delivering all the drama. Are you following the action?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival weekend
moments.blurb: Scotland's biggest music festival, TRNSMT, is taking over Glasgow Green this weekend, concluding tomorrow.

angles.name: Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Glasgow Green is buzzing! TRNSMT Festival is in full swing, bringing incredible live music to Scotland this weekend. Who's been your highlight?

angles.name: Final Day
angles.copy: Last day tomorrow at TRNSMT! If you're there, enjoy the final acts. If not, who are you wishing you could see?

moments.title: Latitude Festival approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, known for its diverse music, arts, and comedy lineup, kicks off next Friday at Henham Park in Suffolk.

angles.name: Lineup Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for Latitude! Henham Park in Suffolk will be alive with music, comedy and arts from next Friday. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: One Week To Go
angles.copy: Only one week to go until Latitude Festival! Excited for a weekend of culture and great tunes?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart out
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated today, revealing the nation's biggest hits and who holds the coveted Number 1 spot.

angles.name: Number 1 Reveal
angles.copy: It's Friday, which means a brand new Official Singles Chart! Who do you think is Number 1 this week?

angles.name: Chart Surprises
angles.copy: The UK's biggest songs have been revealed. Any surprises in this week's Official Singles Chart?

moments.title: Love Island drama continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is heating up on ITV2, with new bombshells and relationship twists keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Evening Drama
angles.copy: Is your head turned by the latest Love Island drama? The villa is serving up serious entertainment tonight!

angles.name: Coupling Up
angles.copy: Who's coupling up and who's getting dumped? Love Island UK is bringing the heat every night.

moments.title: House of the Dragon continues
moments.blurb: The second season of HBO's hit prequel series, House of the Dragon, is currently airing, delving deeper into the Targaryen civil war.

angles.name: Fantasy Drama
angles.copy: Are you ready for more fire and blood? House of the Dragon Season 2 is delivering epic fantasy drama weekly.

angles.name: Predictions
angles.copy: The battle for the Iron Throne is intensifying in House of the Dragon. What are your predictions for the next episode?

moments.title: Happy 67th to Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Timeless Music
angles.copy: From 'Luka' to 'Tom's Diner', Suzanne Vega has given us some timeless music. Happy birthday to the folk icon!

moments.title: Richie Sambora turns 67
moments.blurb: Legendary Bon Jovi guitarist Richie Sambora, co-writer of many of their biggest hits, celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to the one and only Richie Sambora! What's your favourite Bon Jovi riff he played?

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Richie Sambora, the guitar hero turning 67 today. Still rocking after all these years!

moments.title: Harrison Ford turns 84
moments.blurb: Iconic actor Harrison Ford, star of Indiana Jones and Star Wars, celebrates his 84th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Hollywood Legend
angles.copy: He's played Han Solo, Indiana Jones and Rick Deckard. Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to the legend that is Harrison Ford on Monday!

angles.name: Favourite Movie
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true Hollywood icon! Harrison Ford turns 84 this Monday. What's your favourite of his movies?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of the influential 60s band The Byrds, will be celebrating his 84th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to Roger McGuinn of The Byrds on Monday! What's your favourite track from the folk-rock pioneer?

angles.name: Iconic Sounds
angles.copy: The man behind some of the 60s most iconic sounds, Roger McGuinn, celebrates his 84th on Monday. Play a Byrds classic today!

moments.title: Louise Redknapp turns 52
moments.blurb: Pop star and Eternal member Louise Redknapp will celebrate her 52nd birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Eternal Hit
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 52nd birthday to Louise Redknapp on Monday! What's your favourite Eternal hit?

angles.name: Solo Success
angles.copy: From Eternal to solo success, Louise Redknapp has had a fantastic career. Happy 52nd to her on Monday!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland turns 74
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Police, Stewart Copeland, will celebrate his 74th birthday next Thursday.

angles.name: Drumming Maestro
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're wishing a very happy 74th birthday to The Police's drumming maestro, Stewart Copeland! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Iconic Sound
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate the rhythmic genius of Stewart Copeland, who turns 74 next Thursday. What an iconic sound!

moments.title: M.I.A. turns 51
moments.blurb: Innovative artist M.I.A., known for her unique blend of electronic, dance, and world music, celebrates her 51st birthday next Saturday.

angles.name: Groundbreaking Artist
angles.copy: Next Saturday, we're celebrating the 51st birthday of the groundbreaking artist M.I.A.! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Pushing Boundaries
angles.copy: From 'Paper Planes' to 'Bad Girls', M.I.A. always pushes boundaries. Happy 51st birthday to her next Saturday!

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May, famous for his iconic riffs and astronomical pursuits, celebrates his 79th birthday next Sunday.

angles.name: Queen Guitar Solo
angles.copy: Next Sunday, we're wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: Happy 79th to Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May next Sunday! Still rocking the world with his iconic sound.

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: The iconic guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive blend of rock, Latin, and blues, will celebrate his 79th birthday next Monday.

angles.name: Santana Track
angles.copy: Next Monday, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of the legendary Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: From Woodstock to global superstardom, Carlos Santana's guitar work is instantly recognisable. Happy 79th to him next Monday!

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and singer-songwriter Don Henley, known for his distinctive vocals and drumming, celebrates his 79th birthday next Tuesday.

angles.name: Eagles Song
angles.copy: Next Tuesday, we're wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon Don Henley! What's your favourite Eagles song he sang on?

angles.name: True Legend
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, Don Henley is a true legend. Happy 79th to him next Tuesday!

moments.title: Summer Holidays are here!
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are breaking up for the long summer holidays this week, marking the start of a busy season for families.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: The school gates are closing for summer! Happy holidays to all the kids and parents out there. What are your plans?

angles.name: Summer To-Do List
angles.copy: Sunshine, fun, and no school runs! The summer holidays are officially here for many. What's top of your summer to-do list?
